---
title: "jackknife"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`jackknife.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/jackknife.py)
:::


## API Reference

### `JackknifeSamples` {#jackknifesamples}

```python
class JackknifeSamples(np.ndarray)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/jackknife.py#L5){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `JackknifeSamples.__new__` {#jackknifesamples-__new__}

```python
def __new__(cls, input_array)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/jackknife.py#L6){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `JackknifeSamples.__array_finalize__` {#jackknifesamples-__array_finalize__}

```python
def __array_finalize__(self, obj)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/jackknife.py#L10){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `JackknifeSamples.__array_function__` {#jackknifesamples-__array_function__}

```python
def __array_function__(self, func, types, args, kwargs)
```

Block np.mean, np.std, np.average etc.
The user should call the methods of this class explicitly, to avoid mistakes

.. ldt-id:: JKF-JackknifeSamples-__array_function__

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/jackknife.py#L13){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `JackknifeSamples.mean` {#jackknifesamples-mean}

```python
def mean(self, *args, **kwargs)
```

jackknife mean (unbiased by construction)

.. ldt-id:: JKF-JackknifeSamples-mean

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/jackknife.py#L27){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `JackknifeSamples.error` {#jackknifesamples-error}

```python
def error(self)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/jackknife.py#L34){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `uncorrelated_confs_to_jkf` {#uncorrelated_confs_to_jkf}

```python
def uncorrelated_confs_to_jkf(x, N_jkf) -> JackknifeSamples
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/jackknife.py#L39){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `correlated_confs_to_jkf` {#correlated_confs_to_jkf}

```python
def correlated_confs_to_jkf(Cg: np.ndarray, N_jkf: int, output_file=None) -> JackknifeSamples
```

Jackknife samples from array of correlated configurations

- The configurations are sampled every tau_int, (integrated autocorrelation time)
- The Jackknife samples are drawn from the uncorrelated configurations

Args:
    C (np.ndarray): 1-dimensional "correlator" (observable computed for each configuration)
    N_bts (int): Number of Jackknifes

Returns:
    np.ndarray: Jackknife samples

.. ldt-id:: JKF-correlated_confs_to_jkf

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/jackknife.py#L46){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
